description.name: Passkey (Biometric) Security
description.long: The eHostPK Passkey Security module for WHMCS brings next-generation passwordless authentication to your billing area. This plugin allows both Clients and Admins to secure their accounts using device-native biometrics like Mac TouchID, Windows Hello, FaceID, or Fingerprint scanners. Built with high-grade AES-256-GCM encryption and WebAuthn protocol, it ensures top-tier security without the need for traditional passwords or SMS OTPs. Configuration is seamless via the admin panel with full support for multi-session environments.
features: Passwordless login using native device biometrics
Supports Mac TouchID, iPhone FaceID, and Android Fingerprint
High-grade AES-256-GCM encryption for credential storage
Full CSRF protection for all authentication requests
Smart Multi-Session detection for Admin and Client areas
Dynamic Display Names: Full Name ( Email ) on biometric prompt
Seamless integration with WHMCS 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication) system
Automatic fallback to backup codes if biometric device is unavailable
One-click device registration for quick setup
No external library dependencies - purely native WebAuthn implementation
